description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the javiersantos/android-ci:28.0.2 Docker image. Set a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory and makes gradlew executable. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG storing .gradle/. For the build stage add jobs build_adept_core, build_adept_extension_experimental, build_adept_extension_fresco, build_adept_extension_glide, build_adept_extension_picasso, and build_sample, each running ./gradlew :<module>:assembleRelease, producing AAR or APK artifacts in their respective build/outputs directories, and only on master or dev branches. Add a test_adept_core job in the test stage that runs ./gradlew :adept-core:test and ./gradlew :adept-core:jacocoTestReport, stores the adept-core/build/ artifact, and runs only on master or dev. Finally, add deploy jobs deploy_adept_core, deploy_adept_extension_experimental, deploy_adept_extension_fresco, deploy_adept_extension_glide, and deploy_adept_extension_picasso in the deploy stage, each executing ./gradlew :<module>:bintrayUpload and only on the master branch.
